title: Poorly Formatted General Software Synthetic Case

responsibilities: Collaborate with product and customer support
requirements.requirement_notes: A degree is explicitly not required. The role requires reliable overlap from noon to 4 p.m. Eastern.

critical_checks.description: Recover title, company, remote arrangement, and contract type from compressed text.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Extract Cloud App Developer at Atlas Route as a remote six-month contract.
evidence_quotes: ATLAS ROUTE / cloud app developer / remote — U.S. time zones

critical_checks.description: Normalize the short-form deadline and preserve the absence of a degree requirement.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Return deadline 2026-09-01 and leave education requirements empty.

critical_checks.description: Do not infer authorization restrictions from a U.S.-time-zone condition.
critical_checks.expected_behavior: Leave work authorization and hard disqualifiers empty.
evidence_quotes: The listing contains no statement about work authorization, citizenship, clearance, or visa sponsorship.

known_traps.description: U.S. time zones is a scheduling and location constraint, not proof of work authorization.
forbidden_interpretations: Must be authorized to work in the United States

known_traps.description: Culture and equal-opportunity boilerplate are not technical qualifications.
forbidden_interpretations: Benefits are provided to the contractor
